items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. Launches Strikes After Iranian Attack Kills 2 American Soldiers
items.summary: The soldiers, killed in Jordan, were the first U.S. troops to die from hostile fire since an April truce. U.S. forces began retaliatory strikes early Sunday.
